SearchOperations_searchMessages.usage:
params = SearchMessagesParams(
    query="example",
    chat_ids=[1],
    user_ids=[1],
    created_from="2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    created_to="2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    sort=SearchSort.RELEVANCE,
    limit=1,
    cursor="example"
)
await client.search.search_messages(params=params)
